name: Jarvis Jams
description: Browser-based modular synth studio built on the Web Audio API. Patch oscillators, filters, envelopes, and effects in a drag-and-drop rack. Includes a 16-step beat machine, Joog (Moog Mavis-style synth voice), Abacus (dual ADSR with CV outputs), Swells (multi-model reverb with swell envelope), and Capture (route mic or system audio into the rack).
